summary: General community events across the year, including monthly holiday activities, family gatherings, downtown celebrations, and civic traditions.

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.text: This is not an official publication of any individual organizer, host group, or sponsor represented in these listings. Information is provided for convenience only and may not be complete or current. Event organizers and supporters are not responsible for updates, corrections, or omissions.
